title: mentha fluvialis
intro: Mentha fluvialis, also known as river mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha fluvialis include soothing digestive issues, relieving headaches, and reducing stress, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Mentha fluvialis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
